user.title: Set up HA Input Bridge
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to a Windows PC running HA Input Bridge.

data_description.name: Display name for this bridge.
data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the Windows PC running HA Input Bridge.
data_description.port: The port used by HA Input Bridge. The default is 8765.
data_description.token: The secret token generated by the Windows bridge installer.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to HA Input Bridge.

abort.already_configured: This HA Input Bridge instance is already configured.
